task_objective: Fix incorrect missing value counts and matrix representations in the report.
design_decisions: NaN values are now explicitly handled in the 'missing' metric using safe_col() which treats them as NULL.
The JSON output is now sanitized to replace NaN/Inf with None for standard JSON compatibility.
Correlation matrices are transformed to list-of-dicts format in to_dict() to match ydata-profiling schema.
The SPA template was updated to be polymorphic, supporting both raw matrix and list-of-dicts formats.
results: Missing value counts for columns with NaNs are now correct (previously 0). JSON reports are now valid JSON (no more raw NaN tokens). Correlation matrices follow standard ydata-profiling format while remaining renderable in the SPA.
